headline: 今日AI速览：学术研究最活跃
narrative:
今日共收录282篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究189篇, 开源项目54篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API9篇。热门标签：Agent（69篇）。其中12%的文章有多来源交叉验证。

▸ iptv-org /iptv：Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world

▸ addyosmani /agent-skills：Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.

▸ chatwoot /chatwoot：Open-source live-chat, email support, omni-channel desk. An alternative to Intercom, Zendesk, Salesf

▸ obra /superpowers：An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

▸ apple /container：A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is
text: 今日共收录282篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究189篇, 开源项目54篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API9篇。热门标签：Agent（69篇）。其中12%的文章有多来源交叉验证。
